name: Grape Nuts- Homemade
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the Graham flour.
2. Measure and add baking soda and salt to the sifted flour.
3. Sift again.
4. Add brown sugar and mix thoroughly with the dry ingredients.
5. Gradually add buttermilk (or sour milk) and beat until the mixture is smooth.
6. Spread the dough 1/4 inch thick on greased, flat pans.
7. Bake at 375°F for approximately 15 minutes or until crisp and golden brown.
8. Let cool thoroughly before grinding through a food chopper.
9. Serve crisp just before serving.
